description_long: This is a large, upscale detached house surrounded by a manicured yard and enclosed by a dark fence. The house features multiple steeply pitched gable and hip roofs, with a mix of brick and light-colored exterior walls. The front includes a double garage, a landscaped driveway, and a formal entryway with steps and decorative plantings. The rear of the property boasts a spacious lawn, a curvilinear swimming pool, and a patio area with outdoor seating. Numerous large windows are symmetrically arranged, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is accented by shrubs, flower beds, and mature trees, giving it a suburban, high-end residential feel.
description: A large, elegant suburban house with steep gable roofs, a double garage, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool, enclosed by a dark fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, driveway, and formal landscaping with flower beds and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side garden, and partial view of the backyard with the pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive lawn, curvilinear swimming pool, patio seating, and large rear windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side garden, fence, and a clear look at the house's multi-level structure and rooflines.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, double doors, small porch, and decorative landscaping
